title: Dorry and Brogy Clear the Sea
description: On pages 13–16, dorry and brogy clear the sea as the Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent.
scene: Dorry and Brogy Clear the Sea. The Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I see... Busy lil' buggers, aren'cha?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It's a shame but we won't ask you to stay longer.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I hope your country's safe, girl.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: See ya then! Don't die anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just you wait. My catch is definitely bigger.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ha, sure it is, son.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Master! I'll go to Elbaf for sure one day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our friends are setting sail...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, can't leave them to fend for themselves. That monster lives in the seas to the west.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Dorry,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How're your wounds...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmph, it's nothing serious.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I guess this is it for my axe and your sword, isn't it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Having trouble letting go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 'Course I do. This is the axe I've fought with + for over a hundred years. But even so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it's for their sake,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have no regrets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then it's decided.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Look! My lizard is clearly bigger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are your eyes just for show or something? The bigger animal is my rhino.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: who cares, they both look pretty tasty to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You stay out of this!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: How long are you two going to bicker?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: We can't even carry all that much meat. Just pack up as much as we need and let's go already.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: It's time to set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: As you wish, Nami! (^)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, Usopp, mine's clearly bigger, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huh? I couldn't care less.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is a tie no good?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no tie in a contest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If we sail straight from here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We should be able to exit on the western side of the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do you think we should've packed some more of that meat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: don't be stupid. We don't even have enough space to preserve any more than this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Are you trying to sink our ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah! It's the giants!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They've come to see us off!

summary: This part centers on dorry and brogy clear the sea, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
